title: Wearable Lanterns (Trinket)
description: Adds a Trinket Slot for your Lantern. Randers Lantern on your hip and also lights in the dark. (Requires LambDynamicLights and Trinkets Mods)
body:
Wearable Lanterns                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  Light up the dark hands-free! Equip lanterns as trinkets and carry your light source wherever you go.                                                                                                                             

  Features

  Multiple Wear Positions
  - Hip (Legs slot) — Hangs at your side with realistic pendulum physics and leg collision
  - Shoulder (Chest slot) — Sways gently as you walk
  - Head (Head slot) — Sits right on top of your head

  Dynamic Lighting
  Wearing a lantern places a real light source at your feet, illuminating your surroundings as you move.

  Physics Simulation
  The lantern swings naturally as you walk, run, and jump — complete with momentum, damping, and bounce-off when it contacts your leg.

  Configurable
  Choose your preferred position (left/right hip, left/right shoulder) through Mod Menu or fine-tune every value in the config file.

  Mod Compatibility
  Automatically detects and supports lanterns from other mods, including:
  - Supplementaries
  - Create
  - Decorative Blocks
  - Architect's Palette
  - Oh The Biomes You'll Go
  - ...and any mod that adds items with "lantern" in the name

  Dependencies

  - https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
  - https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets
  - https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu (optional, for in-game config)

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de932476bd929907e16cd57faa867a21cafd39b3.png)
